---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for The Forge
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem are you trying to solve?**
The motivation behind the request.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see.

**Keep in mind**
The Forge is intentionally a simple, single-user, dependency-light app. Features
that preserve that are easiest to land.
